name: POSTCRICOID DEFECT
definition: variable defect seen commonly in the fully distended cervical esophagus; no pathologic value

demographics.Etiology: redundancy of mucosa over rich postcricoid submucosal venous plexus
demographics.Location: anterior aspect of esophagus at level of cricoid cartilage

dominant_finding: tumor- / weblike lesion with variable configuration during swallowing
distribution: anterior aspect of esophagus at level of cricoid cartilage
discriminating_features: tumor- / weblike lesion with variable configuration during swallowing

general: tumor- / weblike lesion with variable configuration during swallowing
